description: An explicit .orchestrator/STOP signal beats everything, mid-loop, with one acceptance criterion still pending. The loop must halt cleanly and hand off, never re-feed.

harness_invocation.cwd: this fixture's .orchestrator/ tree copied into an isolated temp dir

handoff_contains: [x] 429 returned once the bucket is empty (done)
[ ] Bucket refills at the configured rate (pending)

notes: STOP is checked before the promise/evidence/anchor gates, so it wins even mid-task with open acceptance criteria.

write_handoff() runs BEFORE cleanup_and_stop(), so HANDOFF.md captures the frozen goal, the AC checklist (including the still-pending AC2), and the last journal attempts before the scratchpad is deleted.
STOP always triggers a handoff when scratchpad meta existed — a STOPped loop is an INCOMPLETE stop by definition.
